Our Story

Why San Antonio Chooses Over the top barbershop

We are a trusted barbershop proudly serving the San Antonio community. Known for quality, reliability, and outstanding customer service — which is why our customers keep coming back and telling their friends.

With a 5.0-star rating from 133 verified customers on Google, our reputation speaks for itself. Every client walks away satisfied — that's not a goal, it's our standard.

"I brought my son here to see Chris. He takes his time, pays attention to detail, and makes sure every cut fits your face and style. The atmosphere is comfortable and you never feel rushed. If you’re looking for consistency and quality every single time, this is your barber. Highly recommend."
